Class OpenAiCompatibleResponse

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.provider.Response<OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage>
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.OpenAiCompatibleResponse
public class OpenAiCompatibleResponse extends Response<OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage>
Encapsulates the complete response from an OpenAI-compatible API. It parses the native OpenAI JSON (standard or Responses API) into Anahata's model messages and usage metadata.
Author:
anahata

    private final List<OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage>

    The final candidates (choices) converted to Anahata messages.

    The unique identifier for the response (e.g., chatcmpl-..., resp_...).

    rawHistoryJson
    The raw conversation history JSON sent as part of the payload.
    private final String
    rawJson
    The complete raw response JSON received from the API.
    private final String
    rawRequestConfigJson
    The raw request configuration JSON sent to the API.
    private final ResponseUsageMetadata
    usageMetadata
    Usage statistics from the API, including prompt and completion tokens.

  • Field Details

    • id

      private final String id
      The unique identifier for the response (e.g., chatcmpl-..., resp_...).

    • candidates

      private final List<OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage> candidates
      The final candidates (choices) converted to Anahata messages.

    • usageMetadata

      private final ResponseUsageMetadata usageMetadata
      Usage statistics from the API, including prompt and completion tokens.

    • rawRequestConfigJson

      private final String rawRequestConfigJson
      The raw request configuration JSON sent to the API.

      The raw conversation history JSON sent as part of the payload.

      The complete raw response JSON received from the API.

  • Constructor Details

    • OpenAiCompatibleResponse

      public OpenAiCompatibleResponse(Agi agi, String modelId, String jsonResponse, String requestPayload, String historyJson, OpenAiCompatibleModel model, ResponseUsageMetadata estimatedUsage)
      Constructs a new response object with pre-calculated usage metadata. Used for client-side estimation when the API doesn't provide usage data.
      Parameters:
      agi - The parent session.
      modelId - The ID of the model.
      jsonResponse - The raw JSON response.
      requestPayload - The raw payload sent.
      historyJson - The history segment of the payload.
      model - The model instance.
      estimatedUsage - The pre-calculated usage metadata.

    • OpenAiCompatibleResponse

      public OpenAiCompatibleResponse(Agi agi, String modelId, String jsonResponse, String requestPayload, String historyJson, OpenAiCompatibleModel model)
      Constructs a new response object by parsing the JSON returned from an OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
      Parameters:
      agi - The parent session.
      modelId - The ID of the model.
      jsonResponse - The raw JSON response string.
      requestPayload - The raw payload sent to the API.
      historyJson - The raw history segment of the payload.
      model - The model instance to retrieve reasoning configuration from.

  • Method Details

    • parseCandidates

      private void parseCandidates(Agi agi, String modelId, OpenAiCompatibleModel model, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode responseNode)
      Internal utility to parse the 'choices' or 'output' array from the API response.
      Parameters:
      agi - The parent session.
      modelId - The model ID.
      model - The model instance.
      responseNode - The root response JSON node.

    • getPromptFeedback

      public Optional<String> getPromptFeedback()
      Gets the prompt feedback message, which explains why the prompt was blocked, if applicable.

      OpenAI does not provide standard prompt feedback in the completion response; returns empty.

      Specified by:
      getPromptFeedback in class Response<OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage>
      Returns:
      An Optional containing the block reason message, or empty if not blocked.

    • getTotalTokenCount

      public int getTotalTokenCount()
      Gets the total number of tokens for the entire interaction (prompt + all candidates).

      Returns the total token count as reported in the 'usage' block of the API response.

      Specified by:
      getTotalTokenCount in class Response<OpenAiCompatibleModelMessage>
      Returns:
      The total token count.
